documents.title: Inflix Product Overview
documents.content:
Inflix is an AI-powered social media automation platform designed for businesses, agencies, and content creators. It combines intelligent scheduling, AI-driven content generation, and deep analytics to help you grow your social media presence efficiently and authentically.

Core Mission: Help businesses of all sizes compete on social media by automating the tedious parts while keeping the human touch.

Key Differentiators:
- AI that learns your brand voice
- Predictive analytics for optimal posting times
- Multi-platform management from one dashboard
- Built-in content library and asset management

documents.title: Supported Platforms
documents.content:
Inflix supports all major social media platforms:

Fully Supported:
- Instagram (posts, stories, reels, carousels)
- Twitter/X (tweets, threads, polls)
- LinkedIn (posts, articles, company pages)
- Facebook (pages, groups, stories)
- TikTok (videos, duets, stitches)

Partially Supported:
- Pinterest (pins, boards)
- YouTube (shorts, community posts)
- Snapchat (stories)

All platforms can be managed from a single unified dashboard.

documents.title: AI Content Generation
documents.content:
Inflix AI Content Generation Features:

1. Caption Generator: Creates engaging captions based on your image/video content, brand voice profile, and target audience demographics. Supports 25+ languages.

2. Hashtag AI: Analyzes trending hashtags in real-time and suggests optimal hashtag sets for each post. Includes reach estimations.

3. Image Suggestions: Recommends Unsplash/Getty images or suggests Canva templates that match your content theme.

4. Content Calendar AI: Generates a full month of content ideas based on your industry, audience, and upcoming events.

5. A/B Testing: Automatically creates variations of captions to test which performs better.

documents.title: Analytics & Reporting
documents.content:
Inflix Analytics Dashboard:

Post Performance:
- Reach, impressions, engagement rate
- Click-through rates and link tracking
- Best performing post formats and times

Audience Insights:
- Demographics (age, location, gender, interests)
- Growth tracking and follower analysis
- Audience activity patterns

Competitor Analysis (Growth+ plans):
- Track up to 10 competitor accounts
- Benchmark your metrics against industry averages
- Identify content gaps and opportunities

Custom Reports:
- White-label PDF reports for client presentations
- Scheduled email reports (weekly/monthly)

documents.title: Pricing & Plans
documents.content:
Inflix Pricing Plans (billed monthly, 20% off annually):

Starter Plan - $29/month
- 5 social accounts
- 30 scheduled posts/month
- Basic analytics
- AI caption generation (50 credits/month)
- Email support
- 14-day free trial

Growth Plan - $79/month (Most Popular)
- 15 social accounts
- Unlimited scheduled posts
- Advanced analytics + competitor tracking (5 accounts)
- AI content generation (500 credits/month)
- Priority live chat support
- 3 team seats
- Content calendar
- Canva + Google Drive integrations
- 14-day free trial

Enterprise Plan - Custom pricing
- Unlimited accounts
- Unlimited AI credits
- Custom AI brand voice training
- Dedicated success manager
- SSO, SAML, advanced security
- Full API + webhooks
- White-label options
- Custom SLA

All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

documents.title: Integrations
documents.content:
Inflix Integrations:

Design Tools:
- Canva (import designs directly)
- Adobe Express
- Figma (beta)

Storage:
- Google Drive
- Dropbox
- OneDrive

Communication:
- Slack (post notifications, approval workflows)
- Microsoft Teams

CRM & Marketing:
- HubSpot (lead sync)
- Salesforce (enterprise)
- Mailchimp (campaign coordination)

E-commerce:
- Shopify (product posts)
- WooCommerce

Analytics:
- Google Analytics (traffic attribution)
- Google Data Studio

Automation:
- Zapier (1000+ app connections)
- Make (formerly Integromat)

API: Full REST API available on Growth and Enterprise plans with webhooks support.

documents.title: Getting Started & Onboarding
documents.content:
Getting Started with Inflix:

Step 1: Sign Up (2 minutes)
- Go to inflix.ai
- Enter email and create password
- No credit card required for 14-day trial

Step 2: Connect Social Accounts (3 minutes)
- Click 'Add Account' for each platform
- Authorize Inflix via OAuth
- Accounts connected instantly

Step 3: Set Up Brand Voice (5 minutes)
- Fill in brand name, industry, tone
- Add sample posts you love
- AI learns your style

Step 4: Create Your First Post (2 minutes)
- Upload media or use AI to find images
- Click 'Generate Caption'
- Review, edit, and schedule

Step 5: Set Auto-Schedule
- Enable Smart Schedule
- AI picks best times based on your audience
- Sit back and let Inflix work!

Support: 24/7 live chat, extensive knowledge base, video tutorials, and weekly webinars.

documents.title: Security & Compliance
documents.content:
Inflix Security:

Data Security:
- SOC 2 Type II certified
- End-to-end encryption (TLS 1.3)
- Data stored on AWS with AES-256 encryption
- Regular third-party security audits

Privacy:
- GDPR compliant
- CCPA compliant
- No selling of user data
- Data deletion requests honored within 30 days

Access Control:
- Role-based access (Admin, Editor, Viewer)
- SSO/SAML support (Enterprise)
- Two-factor authentication (all plans)
- IP whitelisting (Enterprise)

Social Account Safety:
- OAuth-only connections (no passwords stored)
- Minimal permission scopes requested
- Instant account disconnect option
